case_title: JUGESTA NORRIS VS. IREPAIR WIRELESS SOLUTIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CARLOS JACOBI, CEO. FILED BY DEFENDANT IREPAIR WIRELESS SOLUTIONS, INC.
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF NORRIS, JUGESTA
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORRIS, JUGESTA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JUGESTA NORRIS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IREPAIR WIRELESS SOLUTIONS, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CARLOS JACOBI (CEO) AND EDDIE SANDOVAL (CFO). VALID PROOF OF SERVICE HAS NOT BEEN FILED. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 8-18-22 WAS DEEMED INVALID AT THE LAST TRIAL DATE ON 9-14-22. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE FILED.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED. COPIES OF CHALLENGE MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. FILED BY DEFENDANT IREPAIR WIRELESS SOLUTIONS, INC. AS TO PLAINTIFF NORRIS, JUGESTA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) EDDIE SANDOVAL, CFO. FILED BY DEFENDANT IREPAIR WIRELESS SOLUTIONS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-16-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUGESTA NORRIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IREPAIR WIRELESS SOLUTIONS, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CARLOS JACOBI (CEO) AND EDDIE SANDOVAL (CFO). PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 8-18-2022 IS INVALID. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
